# Duelverse

> Global platform for live remote TCG duels (Yu-Gi-Oh, Magic: The Gathering, Pokémon TCG) with video call, tournaments, ranking and a deck builder. Players can create rooms, join matchmaking, run weekly tournaments and earn DuelCoins.

Duelverse hosts live, face-to-face TCG duels over WebRTC video so players anywhere in the world can play with their physical cards. Supports Yu-Gi-Oh (Advanced, Rush Duel, Genesis), Magic: The Gathering and Pokémon TCG, with a digital arena simulator, judge system, marketplace and PRO subscriptions.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Dashboard with quick match, duels and tournaments.
- [Duels](/duels): Browse and join open duel rooms.
- [Matchmaking](/matchmaking): Get matched automatically with another duelist.
- [Tournaments](/tournaments): Public tournaments (Swiss + Top cut).
- [Weekly Tournaments](/weekly-tournaments): Recurring weekly events with prize pools.
- [Ranking](/ranking): Global leaderboard per TCG.
- [News](/news): Patch notes and platform announcements.
- [Match Gallery](/gallery): Recorded matches shared by the community.
- [Deck Builder](/deck-builder): Build, save and import decks (multi-TCG).
- [Marketplace](/marketplace): Buy and sell cards and accessories.
- [Store](/store): Subscriptions and digital items.
- [DuelCoins](/duelcoins): Platform currency, balance and packages.
- [Friends](/friends): Manage friends and chat.
- [Install App](/install-app): PWA / Android install instructions.
- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or log in.

## Optional

- [Landing](/landing): Marketing landing page for new visitors.
- [My Items](/my-items): Owned cosmetics (sleeves, playmats).
- [My Tournaments](/my-tournaments): Tournaments the user organizes.
- [Transfer History](/transfer-history): DuelCoins transaction history.
